{%- comment -%} Overrides the competitive-verifier theme's document_header.html to display paths with the leading "src/" stripped (headers are included with bare names via -I src), including in the include directive. {%- endcomment -%} {%- assign display_path = include.data.path | remove_first: "src/" -%} {%- if page.title -%} {%- capture page_title -%}{{page.title | xml_escape }} ({{ display_path | xml_escape }}){%- endcapture -%} {%- else -%} {%- capture page_title -%}{{display_path | xml_escape }}{%- endcapture -%} {%- endif -%} {%- comment -%} Catch2 unit tests are not verification files; mark them instead of the not-verified icon. {%- endcomment -%} {%- if include.data.path contains ".test.cpp" and include.data.path contains "src/" -%}

🧪 {{ page_title | xml_escape }}

{%- else -%}

{{ site.icons[include.data.verificationStatus] }} {{ page_title | xml_escape }}

{%- endif -%}
  • View this file on GitHub
    • {% if include.data.documentPath %}
  • View document part on GitHub
    • {%- endif -%}
  • Last update: {{ include.data.timestamp }}
    • {% if include.data.attributes.PROBLEM %}
  • Problem: {{ include.data.attributes.PROBLEM | xml_escape }}
    • {%- endif -%} {% if include.data.pathExtension == "hpp" %}
  • Include: #include "{{ display_path }}"
    • {%- endif -%} {% if include.data.isFailed %}
  • Link: {{ site.icons[include.data.verificationStatus] }} View error logs on GitHub Actions
    • {%- endif -%} {%- for link in include.data.attributes.links -%} {%- if link != include.data.attributes.PROBLEM -%}
  • Link: {{ link | xml_escape }}
    • {%- endif -%} {%- endfor -%}
{% if include.data.pathExtension == "hpp" %} {%- endif -%}
